_meta.description: Allowlisted REGIONAL LATENT COMPOSITION (the maintainer's vertical-stack signature). Three independently-prompted regions are sampled separately (rough fast pass), feather-composited into one tall canvas with two LatentComposite nodes, then a UNIFYING KSampler re-diffuses the whole composite at moderate denoise so the seams knit into one coherent picture. Composition control = place three distinct generations into one frame; cohere them with a vertical world-axis prompt in the unify pass + the feather. submit fills ONLY the listed nodes; _meta stripped before POST; ckpt_name in allowlist. Region C (node 12) is the FULL canvas; A and B composite onto it at (x,y) with feather. Faithful to the rig's TRICOMPOSITE flow; checkpoint path is root-level (post-move).

fillable.4.inputs.ckpt_name: model (in allowlist; e.g. reproductionSDXL_2v12.safetensors — root, no subfolder)
fillable.61.inputs.text: region A (top) positive prompt — e.g. a cosmic / aerial sky register
fillable.62.inputs.text: region B (mid) positive prompt — e.g. the mid subject
fillable.63.inputs.text: region C (bottom/full-canvas) positive prompt — e.g. the foreground / ground register
fillable.64.inputs.text: UNIFY positive — the holistic, whole-image prompt that names the vertical world-axis tying the three registers (length-capped)
fillable.30.inputs.feather: composite A feather px (bounded 0..512) — large = soft register blend
fillable.40.inputs.denoise: unify re-diffuse denoise (0.35..0.65) — higher knits seams harder, lower preserves regions

inputs.text: a luminous cosmic sky, aerial register
one coherent vertical composition joined by a central world-axis, atmospheric depth gradient cool-to-warm top-to-bottom
seams, hard band edges, duplicated horizon, text, watermark
